results.title: Microwaves and behavior. - APA PsycNet
excerpts: https://doi.org/10.1037/0003-066X.30.3.391. Discusses the study of radio-frequency electromagnetic fields, especially microwaves, in psychology, noting the involvement of Soviet scientists in this area.

results.title: The role of work in psychological health and well-being: a ...
excerpts: Three illustrative lines of inquiry in which research has affected the potential for informing public policy are presented.

results.title: The common sense model of illness self-regulation: a ...
excerpts: ABSTRACT The common sense model of illness self-regulation outlines the dynamic processes by which individuals perceive, interpret, and respond to health threats and illness-related information. An extended version of the model is proposed, which specifies additional constructs and processes to explain how lay perceptions of health threats impact coping responses and health-related outcomes

results.title: Cognitive therapy. A 30-year retrospective. - Europe PMC
